components/Cart.vue:

components/Cart.vue:
components/Cart.vue:const props = defineProps<{
components/Cart.vue:  persona: Persona;
components/Cart.vue:  selected: string[];
components/Cart.vue:}>();
components/Cart.vue:
components/Cart.vue:const emit = defineEmits<{
components/Cart.vue:  (e: 'toggle', code: string): void;
components/Cart.vue:  (e: 'reset'): void;
components/Cart.vue:}>();
components/Cart.vue:
components/Cart.vue:const mapping = computed(() => FUND_MAPPING[props.persona.title] || { core: [], sat: [], etf: "" });
components/Cart.vue:const coreFunds = computed(() => MOCK_FUNDS.filter(f => mapping.value.core.includes(f.code)));
components/Cart.vue:const satelliteFunds = computed(() => [
components/Cart.vue:  ...MOCK_FUNDS.filter(f => mapping.value.sat.includes(f.code)),
components/Cart.vue:  ...MOCK_FUNDS.filter(f => f.code === mapping.value.etf)
components/Cart.vue:]);
components/Cart.vue:
components/Cart.vue:const openSubscription = () => {
components/Cart.vue:  window.open("https://dev-fund.cmoneyfund.com.tw/transaction", "_blank");
components/Cart.vue:};

components/ShareButton.vue:
components/ShareButton.vue:const isOpen = ref(false);
components/ShareButton.vue:const shareUrl = ref('');
components/ShareButton.vue:
components/ShareButton.vue:onMounted(() => {
components/ShareButton.vue:  shareUrl.value = window.location.origin + window.location.pathname;
components/ShareButton.vue:});
components/ShareButton.vue:
components/ShareButton.vue:const toggleMenu = () => {
components/ShareButton.vue:  isOpen.value = !isOpen.value;
components/ShareButton.vue:};
components/ShareButton.vue:
components/ShareButton.vue:const closeMenu = () => {
components/ShareButton.vue:  isOpen.value = false;
components/ShareButton.vue:};
components/ShareButton.vue:

components/ShareButton.vue:  closeMenu();
components/ShareButton.vue:};
components/ShareButton.vue:
components/ShareButton.vue:const shareToLine = () => {

components/ShareButton.vue:const shareToMessenger = () => {
components/ShareButton.vue:  // Messenger sharing is tricky on web without App ID. 
components/ShareButton.vue:  // On mobile, we can try the fb-messenger protocol.
components/ShareButton.vue:  // On desktop, we'll fallback to FB share or a message.
components/ShareButton.vue:  const isMobile = /iPhone|iPad|iPod|Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
components/ShareButton.vue:  if (isMobile) {
components/ShareButton.vue:    window.location.href = `fb-messenger://share/?link=${encodeURIComponent(shareUrl.value)}`;
components/ShareButton.vue:  } else {
components/ShareButton.vue:    // Fallback for desktop: Facebook share dialog
components/ShareButton.vue:    shareToFB();
components/ShareButton.vue:  }
components/ShareButton.vue:  closeMenu();
components/ShareButton.vue:};
components/ShareButton.vue:
components/ShareButton.vue:const copyLink = async () => {
components/ShareButton.vue:  try {
components/ShareButton.vue:    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(shareUrl.value);
components/ShareButton.vue:    alert('連結已複製到剪貼簿！');
components/ShareButton.vue:  } catch (err) {
components/ShareButton.vue:    console.error('無法複製連結', err);
components/ShareButton.vue:  }
components/ShareButton.vue:  closeMenu();
components/ShareButton.vue:};

components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:const speechBubbleText = computed(() => {
components/AppBackground.vue:  const step = route.query.step;
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (!step || step === 'intro') {
components/AppBackground.vue:    return '測測你的投資超能力！';
components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (step === 'results') {
components/AppBackground.vue:    return '這像不像你？';
components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (step === 'quiz1') {

components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (step === 'quiz10' || step === 'quiz10-1') {

components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:

components/AppBackground.vue:    return '倒數計時！剩最後兩題';
components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (step === 'quiz15') {
components/AppBackground.vue:    return '最後一題，準備揭曉！';
components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (step === 'cart') {
components/AppBackground.vue:    return '這些標的跟你最速配';
components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (step === 'login') {
components/AppBackground.vue:    return '登入平台，開始投資！';
components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (step === 'form') {
components/AppBackground.vue:    return '填好資料，驚喜領不完';
components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  if (typeof step === 'string' && step.startsWith('quiz')) {
components/AppBackground.vue:    const qNum = parseInt(step.replace('quiz', ''));
components/AppBackground.vue:    if (!isNaN(qNum)) {
components/AppBackground.vue:      if (qNum >= 2 && qNum <= 9) {
components/AppBackground.vue:        return '繼續前進，財富在招手！';
components/AppBackground.vue:      }
components/AppBackground.vue:      if (qNum >= 11 && qNum <= 13) {
components/AppBackground.vue:        return '繼續種樹，前進宇宙';
components/AppBackground.vue:      }
components/AppBackground.vue:    }
components/AppBackground.vue:  }
components/AppBackground.vue:
components/AppBackground.vue:  return '';
components/AppBackground.vue:});

generate_md.cjs:    // Extract MOCK_FUNDS
generate_md.cjs:    const fundsMatch = content.match(/export const MOCK_FUNDS: Fund\[\] = (\[[\s\S]*?\]);/);
generate_md.cjs:    const funds = eval(fundsMatch[1]);
generate_md.cjs:
generate_md.cjs:    // Extract FUND_MAPPING
generate_md.cjs:    const mappingMatch = content.match(/export const FUND_MAPPING: Record<string, \{core: string\[\], sat: string\[\], etf: string\}> = (\{[\s\S]*?\});/);
generate_md.cjs:    const mapping = eval(`(${mappingMatch[1]})`);
generate_md.cjs:
generate_md.cjs:    let mdContent = '';
generate_md.cjs:
generate_md.cjs:    let i = 1;
generate_md.cjs:    for (const [persona, config] of Object.entries(mapping)) {
generate_md.cjs:        mdContent += `### ${i}. ${persona}\n`;
generate_md.cjs:        
generate_md.cjs:        mdContent += `*   **核心配置**\n`;
generate_md.cjs:        for (const code of config.core) {
generate_md.cjs:            const fund = funds.find(f => f.code === code) || {};
generate_md.cjs:            mdContent += `    *   ${fund.name || code} / ${fund.desc || ''}\n`;
generate_md.cjs:        }
generate_md.cjs:        
generate_md.cjs:        mdContent += `*   **衛星配置**\n`;
generate_md.cjs:        for (const code of config.sat) {
generate_md.cjs:            const fund = funds.find(f => f.code === code) || {};
generate_md.cjs:            mdContent += `    *   ${fund.name || code} / ${fund.desc || ''}\n`;
generate_md.cjs:        }
generate_md.cjs:        
generate_md.cjs:        mdContent += `*   **ETF**\n`;
generate_md.cjs:        const etfFund = funds.find(f => f.code === config.etf) || {};
generate_md.cjs:        mdContent += `    *   ${etfFund.name || config.etf} / ${etfFund.desc || ''}\n\n`;
generate_md.cjs:        
generate_md.cjs:        i++;
generate_md.cjs:    }
generate_md.cjs:
generate_md.cjs:    console.log(mdContent);
generate_md.cjs:} catch (error) {
generate_md.cjs:    console.error('Error:', error);
generate_md.cjs:}

pages/index.vue:onMounted(() => {
pages/index.vue:  const s = route.query.step as string;
pages/index.vue:  if (s) {
pages/index.vue:    if (s.startsWith('quiz')) {
pages/index.vue:      step.value = 'quiz';
pages/index.vue:    } else if (["intro", "form", "results", "login", "cart"].includes(s)) {
pages/index.vue:      step.value = s as any;
pages/index.vue:    }
pages/index.vue:  }
pages/index.vue:  
pages/index.vue:  const savedForm = localStorage.getItem('pocket_form');
pages/index.vue:  if (savedForm) {
pages/index.vue:    try {
pages/index.vue:      const parsed = JSON.parse(savedForm);
pages/index.vue:      if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object') {
pages/index.vue:        formData.value = { ...formData.value, ...parsed };
pages/index.vue:      }
pages/index.vue:    } catch (e) {
pages/index.vue:      console.error('Failed to parse saved form data', e);
pages/index.vue:    }
pages/index.vue:  }
pages/index.vue:});
pages/index.vue:
pages/index.vue:watch(step, (newStep) => {
pages/index.vue:  if (newStep !== 'quiz') {
pages/index.vue:    router.push({ query: { ...route.query, step: newStep } });
pages/index.vue:  }
pages/index.vue:});
pages/index.vue:
pages/index.vue:const handleStart = () => {
pages/index.vue:  console.log("handleStart called, changing step to form");
pages/index.vue:  step.value = 'form';
pages/index.vue:  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
pages/index.vue:};
pages/index.vue:
pages/index.vue:const handleFormChange = (d: UserFormData) => {
pages/index.vue:  formData.value = d;
pages/index.vue:  localStorage.setItem('pocket_form', JSON.stringify(d));

pages/index.vue:
pages/index.vue:const handleQuizComplete = (answers: Record<number, number>) => {
pages/index.vue:  let total = 0;
pages/index.vue:  Object.values(answers).forEach(v => total += v);
pages/index.vue:  const index = Math.max(0, Math.min(Math.floor((total - 15) / 90 * 10), 9));
pages/index.vue:  const p = PERSONAS[index];
pages/index.vue:  if (p) {
pages/index.vue:    persona.value = p;
pages/index.vue:    selectedFunds.value = [];
pages/index.vue:    step.value = "results";
pages/index.vue:  }
pages/index.vue:};
pages/index.vue:

pages/index.vue:  if (selectedFunds.value.includes(code)) {
pages/index.vue:    selectedFunds.value = selectedFunds.value.filter(c => c !== code);
pages/index.vue:  } else {
pages/index.vue:    selectedFunds.value.push(code);
pages/index.vue:  }
pages/index.vue:};

pages/index.vue:        <p>口袋投顧 獨立經營管理</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>各基金經金管會核准或同意生效，惟不表示絕無風險。基金經理公司以往之經理績效不保證基金之最低投資收益；基金經理公司除盡善良管理人之注意義務外，不負責本基金之盈虧，亦不保證最低之收益，投資人申購前應詳閱投資人須知或/與基金公開說明書。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>有關基金應負擔之費用（含分銷費用）已揭露於基金公開說明書及投資人須知，投資人可至公開資訊觀測站或境外基金資訊觀測站中查詢。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>依金融消費者保護法最新相關規定，您於本公司網站完成「風險屬性評估表」，本公司將依客戶屬性做商品適合度規範並至少每年請您更新一次，若未能完成風險屬性評估屆時將會影響您的交易。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>投資外國證券市場，投資人應留意該市場國家之政治、經濟及主權評等變動所可能帶來之投資風險，以確保自身投資權益。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>本基金涉及投資新興市場部份，因其波動性與風險程度可能較高，且其政治與經濟情勢穩定度可能低於已開發國家，也可能使資產價值受不同程度之影響。依金管會規定：</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>投信基金直接投資大陸地區有價證券僅限掛牌上市有價證券，投資人須留意中國市場特定政治、經濟與市場等投資風險。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>境外基金投資大陸地區有價證券不得超過該基金資產淨值之20%，投資人須留意中國市場特定政治、經濟與市場等投資風險。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p class="text-[#8B0000]">由於非投資等級債券之信用評等未達投資等級或未經信用評等，且對利率變動的敏感度甚高，故非投資等級 債券基金可能會因利率上升、市場流動性下降，或債券發行機構違約不支付本金、利息或破產而蒙受虧損。非投資等級債券基金不適合無法承擔相關風險之投資人，投資人投資以非投資等級債券為訴求之基金不宜占其投資組合過高之比重。部份基金或所投資之債券子基金，可能投資美國Rule144A債券，該等債券屬私募性質，較可能發生流動性不足，財務訊息揭露不完整或因價格不透明導致波動性較大之風險，投資人須留意相關風險。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>外幣計價之基金，投資人須承擔取得收益分配或贖回價金時轉換回新臺幣可能產生之匯率風險。若轉換當時之新臺幣兌換外幣匯率相較於原始投資日之匯率升值時，投資人將承受匯兌損失。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>各基金所採用之「公平價格調整」（或「反稀釋」）、短線交易及「價格調整機制（或「擺動定價」）」等機制，相關說明請詳各基金公開說明書。投資人應遵守基金公開說明書所列相關交易規定與限制。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>基金配息率不代表基金報酬率，且過去配息率不代表未來配息率；基金淨值可能因市場因素而上下波動。部分基金配息前未先扣除應負擔之相關費用。基金的配息可能由基金的收益或本金中支付。任何涉及由本金支出的部份，可能導致原始投資金額減損。各基金由本金支付配息之相關資料，投資人可至各投信基金公司及總代理人網站查詢。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>投資人因不同時間進場，將有不同之投資績效，過去之績效亦不代表未來績效之保證，本文提及之經濟走勢預測不必然代表基金之績效，基金投資風險請詳閱基金公開說明書。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>投資人應注意貨幣基金投資之風險包括利率風險、債券交易市場流動性不足之風險及投資無擔保公司債之風險；本基金或有因利率變動、債券交易市場流動性不足及定期存單提前解約而影響基金淨值下跌之風險，同時或有受益人大量贖回時，至延遲給付贖回價款之可能。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>風險報酬等級係依基金類型、投資區域或主要投資標的／產業，由低至高，區分為RR1~RR5五個風險報酬等級。計算過去五年基金淨值波動度標準差，以標準差區間予以分類等級，基金成立未滿五年，將以較短區間或適當參考標的作為評估標準。此等級分類係基於一般市場狀況反映市場價格波動風險，無法涵蓋所有風險，亦不宜作為投資唯一依據，投資人應充分評估基金之投資風險。基金主要相關投資風險已揭露於基金公開說明書或投資人須知。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>有關基金之ESG資訊，投資人應於申購前詳閱基金公開說明書或投資人須知所載之基金所有特色或目標等資訊。相關資訊請至基金資訊觀測站-ESG基金專區查詢。</p>
pages/index.vue:        <p>本公司與所推介分析之個別有價證券無不當之財務利益關係，本公司提供資訊僅供參考，投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。</p>

test_replace.cjs:const fs = require('fs');
test_replace.cjs:let content = fs.readFileSync('utils/constants.ts', 'utf-8');
test_replace.cjs:const code = "97978047";
test_replace.cjs:const desc = "追求基金資產之穩定收益，主要投資於中華民國境內之貨幣市場標的。";
test_replace.cjs:const parts = content.split(`"code": "${code}"`);
test_replace.cjs:if (parts.length > 1) {
test_replace.cjs:    parts[1] = parts[1].replace(/"desc":\s*"[^"]*"/, `"desc": "${desc}"`);
test_replace.cjs:    content = parts.join(`"code": "${code}"`);
test_replace.cjs:    console.log(content.substring(0, 500));
test_replace.cjs:}
export_all_funds.cjs:const fs = require('fs');
export_all_funds.cjs:
export_all_funds.cjs:try {
export_all_funds.cjs:    const content = fs.readFileSync('utils/constants.ts', 'utf-8');
export_all_funds.cjs:    
export_all_funds.cjs:    // Extract MOCK_FUNDS
export_all_funds.cjs:    const fundsMatch = content.match(/export const MOCK_FUNDS: Fund\[\] = (\[[\s\S]*?\]);/);
export_all_funds.cjs:    const funds = eval(fundsMatch[1]);
export_all_funds.cjs:
export_all_funds.cjs:    // Add BOM for Excel UTF-8 compatibility
export_all_funds.cjs:    let csvContent = '\uFEFF';
export_all_funds.cjs:    
export_all_funds.cjs:    // Header
export_all_funds.cjs:    csvContent += '基金代碼,名稱,ISIN Code,類型(核心/衛星/ETF),風險等級,預設描述,近一年績效(%),近二年績效(%),近三年績效(%)\n';
export_all_funds.cjs:
export_all_funds.cjs:    // Rows
export_all_funds.cjs:    for (const fund of funds) {
export_all_funds.cjs:        const code = fund.code || '';
export_all_funds.cjs:        const name = `"${(fund.name || '').replace(/"/g, '""')}"`;
export_all_funds.cjs:        const isin = fund.isin || '';
export_all_funds.cjs:        const type = fund.type || '';
export_all_funds.cjs:        const risk = fund.risk || '';
export_all_funds.cjs:        const desc = `"${(fund.desc || '').replace(/"/g, '""')}"`;
export_all_funds.cjs:        const perf = fund.perf !== undefined ? fund.perf : '';
export_all_funds.cjs:        const perf2y = fund.perf2y !== undefined ? fund.perf2y : '';
export_all_funds.cjs:        const perf3y = fund.perf3y !== undefined ? fund.perf3y : '';

update_desc_fixed.cjs:try {
update_desc_fixed.cjs:    let content = fs.readFileSync('utils/constants.ts', 'utf-8');
update_desc_fixed.cjs:    
update_desc_fixed.cjs:    // Replace descriptions in MOCK_FUNDS
update_desc_fixed.cjs:    for (const [code, desc] of Object.entries(descriptions)) {
update_desc_fixed.cjs:        // Find the block for this code
update_desc_fixed.cjs:        const codeRegex = new RegExp(`"code":\\s*"${code}"`);
update_desc_fixed.cjs:        if (codeRegex.test(content)) {
update_desc_fixed.cjs:            // We need to replace the "desc" field in the same object
update_desc_fixed.cjs:            // A simple way is to split by code, then replace the first "desc"
update_desc_fixed.cjs:            const parts = content.split(`"code": "${code}"`);
update_desc_fixed.cjs:            if (parts.length > 1) {
update_desc_fixed.cjs:                // Replace the first occurrence of "desc": "..." in parts[1]
update_desc_fixed.cjs:                parts[1] = parts[1].replace(/"desc":\s*"[^"]*"/, `"desc": "${desc}"`);
update_desc_fixed.cjs:                content = parts.join(`"code": "${code}"`);
update_desc_fixed.cjs:            }
update_desc_fixed.cjs:        }
update_desc_fixed.cjs:    }
update_desc_fixed.cjs:
update_desc_fixed.cjs:    fs.writeFileSync('utils/constants.ts', content, 'utf-8');
update_desc_fixed.cjs:    console.log('Successfully updated descriptions in utils/constants.ts');
update_desc_fixed.cjs:} catch (error) {
update_desc_fixed.cjs:    console.error('Error updating descriptions:', error);

generate_csv.ts:
generate_csv.ts:let csvContent = '\uFEFF'; // BOM for Excel
generate_csv.ts:csvContent += '投資風格,狗的名稱,核心/衛星/ETF,基金名稱,投資標的說明文字,統編,ISINCODE,幣別,風險等級\n';
generate_csv.ts:
generate_csv.ts:PERSONAS.forEach(persona => {
generate_csv.ts:  const dogName = persona.title;
generate_csv.ts:  const styleDesc = persona.desc;
generate_csv.ts:  const mapping = FUND_MAPPING[dogName];
generate_csv.ts:  
generate_csv.ts:  if (mapping) {
generate_csv.ts:    // Core Funds
generate_csv.ts:    mapping.core.forEach(code => {
generate_csv.ts:      const fund = MOCK_FUNDS.find(f => f.code === code);
generate_csv.ts:      if (fund) {
generate_csv.ts:        csvContent += `"${styleDesc}","${dogName}","核心基金","${fund.name}","${fund.desc}","${fund.code}","${fund.isin}","${fund.currency}","${fund.risk}"\n`;
generate_csv.ts:      }
generate_csv.ts:    });
generate_csv.ts:
generate_csv.ts:    // Satellite Funds
generate_csv.ts:    mapping.sat.forEach(code => {
generate_csv.ts:      const fund = MOCK_FUNDS.find(f => f.code === code);
generate_csv.ts:      if (fund) {
generate_csv.ts:        csvContent += `"${styleDesc}","${dogName}","衛星基金","${fund.name}","${fund.desc}","${fund.code}","${fund.isin}","${fund.currency}","${fund.risk}"\n`;
generate_csv.ts:      }
generate_csv.ts:    });
generate_csv.ts:
generate_csv.ts:    // ETF
generate_csv.ts:    const etf = MOCK_FUNDS.find(f => f.code === mapping.etf);
generate_csv.ts:    if (etf) {
generate_csv.ts:      csvContent += `"${styleDesc}","${dogName}","ETF","${etf.name}","${etf.desc}","${etf.code}","${etf.isin}","${etf.currency}","${etf.risk}"\n`;
generate_csv.ts:    }
generate_csv.ts:  }
generate_csv.ts:});

generate_csv.cjs:const fs = require('fs');
generate_csv.cjs:
generate_csv.cjs:try {
generate_csv.cjs:    const content = fs.readFileSync('utils/constants.ts', 'utf-8');
generate_csv.cjs:
generate_csv.cjs:    // Extract MOCK_FUNDS
generate_csv.cjs:    const fundsMatch = content.match(/export const MOCK_FUNDS: Fund\[\] = (\[[\s\S]*?\]);/);
generate_csv.cjs:    const funds = eval(fundsMatch[1]);
generate_csv.cjs:
generate_csv.cjs:    // Extract FUND_MAPPING
generate_csv.cjs:    const mappingMatch = content.match(/export const FUND_MAPPING: Record<string, \{core: string\[\], sat: string\[\], etf: string\}> = (\{[\s\S]*?\});/);
generate_csv.cjs:    const mapping = eval(`(${mappingMatch[1]})`);
generate_csv.cjs:
generate_csv.cjs:    let csvContent = '\uFEFF'; // Add BOM for Excel to recognize UTF-8 properly
generate_csv.cjs:    csvContent += '人格,配置類型,基金代碼,基金名稱,基金描述\n';
generate_csv.cjs:
generate_csv.cjs:    for (const [persona, config] of Object.entries(mapping)) {
generate_csv.cjs:        // Core
generate_csv.cjs:        for (const code of config.core) {
generate_csv.cjs:            const fund = funds.find(f => f.code === code) || {};
generate_csv.cjs:            csvContent += `${persona},核心配置,${code},${fund.name || ''},"${fund.desc || ''}"\n`;
generate_csv.cjs:        }
generate_csv.cjs:        // Sat
generate_csv.cjs:        for (const code of config.sat) {
generate_csv.cjs:            const fund = funds.find(f => f.code === code) || {};
generate_csv.cjs:            csvContent += `${persona},衛星配置,${code},${fund.name || ''},"${fund.desc || ''}"\n`;
generate_csv.cjs:        }
generate_csv.cjs:        // ETF
generate_csv.cjs:        const etfFund = funds.find(f => f.code === config.etf) || {};
generate_csv.cjs:        csvContent += `${persona},ETF,${config.etf},${etfFund.name || ''},"${etfFund.desc || ''}"\n`;
generate_csv.cjs:    }
generate_csv.cjs:
generate_csv.cjs:    if (!fs.existsSync('public')) {
generate_csv.cjs:        fs.mkdirSync('public');
generate_csv.cjs:    }
generate_csv.cjs:    fs.writeFileSync('public/fund_mapping.csv', csvContent, 'utf-8');
generate_csv.cjs:    console.log('CSV generated successfully at public/fund_mapping.csv');
generate_csv.cjs:} catch (error) {
generate_csv.cjs:    console.error('Error generating CSV:', error);
generate_csv.cjs:}

server/api/generate-image.post.ts:
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  // Try to get API key from runtime config or process.env
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  // Note: process.env.API_KEY is available in the runtime environment
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  const apiKey = config.geminiApiKey || process.env.API_KEY;
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  if (!apiKey) {
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    console.error("API Key is missing in runtime config and process.env");
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    // Return a structured error response instead of throwing 500 to avoid crashing the server logs
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    // The client should handle this gracefully
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    return { error: "API Key missing", imageUrl: null };
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  }
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  // Log key prefix for debugging (do not log full key)
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  console.log("Using API Key starting with:", apiKey.substring(0, 4) + "...");
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  const prompt = `A comic-style character mascot art based on the prototype "Pocket Dog".
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  CHARACTER DESIGN: 
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  1. Body must be a distinct rounded square/pocket shape (tan color top, red color bottom).
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  2. Visible thick white stitching edges along the bottom and side seams of the red "pocket" portion.
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  3. BREED ADAPTATION: Modify ONLY the facial expression, eyes, and ear shapes to resemble a ${breed}. 
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  4. EXPRESSION: The dog should look ${personaTitle.includes("獒") ? "protective and vigilant" : "smart and cheerful"} matching the "${personaTitle}" personality.
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  VISUAL STYLE:
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  - High-contrast comic art, clean bold lines.
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  - NO TEXT, NO WORDS, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS.
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  - BACKGROUND: Pure, solid flat white background (#FFFFFF) only.
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  - ADAPTATION: Change the expression and ears of the original mascot to reflect the ${breed} breed.`;
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  try {
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:      model: "gemini-2.5-flash-image",
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:      contents: { parts: [{ text: prompt }] },
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:      config: { imageConfig: { aspectRatio: "1:1" } }
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    });
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    const candidates = response.candidates;
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    if (candidates && candidates.length > 0) {
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:      const firstCandidate = candidates[0];
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:      if (firstCandidate && firstCandidate.content && firstCandidate.content.parts) {
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:        for (const part of firstCandidate.content.parts) {
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:          if (part.inlineData) {
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:            return { imageUrl: `data:image/png;base64,${part.inlineData.data}` };
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:          }
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:        }
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:      }
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    }
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    return { imageUrl: null };
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  } catch (error: any) {
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    console.error("AI Image Generation failed:", error);
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    // Return error details instead of throwing 500
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:    return { error: error.message || "AI Image Generation failed", imageUrl: null };
server/api/generate-image.post.ts:  }

print_md.ts:import fs from 'fs';
print_md.ts:
print_md.ts:const csv = fs.readFileSync('public/funds_reference.csv', 'utf-8');
print_md.ts:const lines = csv.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim());
print_md.ts:
print_md.ts:const headers = (lines[0] || '').replace('\uFEFF', '').split(',');
print_md.ts:let md = '| ' + headers.join(' | ') + ' |\n';
print_md.ts:md += '| ' + headers.map(() => '---').join(' | ') + ' |\n';
print_md.ts:
print_md.ts:for (let i = 1; i < lines.length; i++) {
print_md.ts:  const line = lines[i] || '';
print_md.ts:  const cols = [];
print_md.ts:  let inQuotes = false;
print_md.ts:  let col = '';
print_md.ts:  for (let j = 0; j < line.length; j++) {
print_md.ts:    const char = line[j];
print_md.ts:    if (char === '"') {
print_md.ts:      inQuotes = !inQuotes;
print_md.ts:    } else if (char === ',' && !inQuotes) {
print_md.ts:      cols.push(col);
print_md.ts:      col = '';
print_md.ts:    } else {
print_md.ts:      col += char;
print_md.ts:    }
print_md.ts:  }
print_md.ts:  cols.push(col);
print_md.ts:  md += '| ' + cols.join(' | ') + ' |\n';
print_md.ts:}
print_md.ts:
print_md.ts:console.log(md);

update_constants.cjs:const lines = csv.split("\n").filter(l => l.trim().length > 0);
update_constants.cjs:const mapping = {};
update_constants.cjs:const funds = [];
update_constants.cjs:const etfLinks = {};
update_constants.cjs:const seenFunds = new Set();
update_constants.cjs:
update_constants.cjs:for (const line of lines) {
update_constants.cjs:  let [persona, type, name, code, isin] = line.split(",");
update_constants.cjs:  if (persona === "口袋吉") persona = "口袋吉娃";
update_constants.cjs:  
update_constants.cjs:  if (!mapping[persona]) {
update_constants.cjs:    mapping[persona] = { core: [], sat: [], etf: "" };
update_constants.cjs:  }
update_constants.cjs:  
update_constants.cjs:  if (type === "核心") {
update_constants.cjs:    mapping[persona].core.push(code);
update_constants.cjs:  } else if (type === "衛星") {
update_constants.cjs:    mapping[persona].sat.push(code);
update_constants.cjs:  } else if (type === "ETF") {
update_constants.cjs:    mapping[persona].etf = code;
update_constants.cjs:    etfLinks[code] = "https://www.pocket.tw/etf/tw/" + code;
update_constants.cjs:  }
update_constants.cjs:  
update_constants.cjs:  if (type !== "ETF" && !seenFunds.has(code)) {
update_constants.cjs:    seenFunds.add(code);
update_constants.cjs:    funds.push({
update_constants.cjs:      code,
update_constants.cjs:      name,
update_constants.cjs:      isin: isin || "",
update_constants.cjs:      currency: name.includes("美元") ? "USD" : "TWD",
update_constants.cjs:      risk: 4,
update_constants.cjs:      type: type === "核心" ? "Core" : "Satellite",
update_constants.cjs:      desc: "優質基金標的，提供穩健的投資選擇。",
update_constants.cjs:      perf: "+10.5%",
update_constants.cjs:      perf2y: "+20.1%",
update_constants.cjs:      perf3y: "+35.2%"
update_constants.cjs:    });
update_constants.cjs:  } else if (type === "ETF" && !seenFunds.has(code)) {
update_constants.cjs:    seenFunds.add(code);
update_constants.cjs:    funds.push({
update_constants.cjs:      code,
update_constants.cjs:      name,
update_constants.cjs:      isin: isin || "",
update_constants.cjs:      currency: "TWD",
update_constants.cjs:      risk: 4,
update_constants.cjs:      type: "Satellite",
update_constants.cjs:      desc: "精選ETF標的，追蹤指數表現。",
update_constants.cjs:      perf: "+15.2%",
update_constants.cjs:      perf2y: "+30.5%",
update_constants.cjs:      perf3y: "+45.8%"
update_constants.cjs:    });
update_constants.cjs:  }
update_constants.cjs:}

update_constants.cjs:const content = fs.readFileSync('utils/constants.ts', 'utf8');
update_constants.cjs:
update_constants.cjs:const newFundsStr = "export const MOCK_FUNDS: Fund[] = " + JSON.stringify(funds, null, 2) + ";";
update_constants.cjs:const newMappingStr = "export const FUND_MAPPING: Record<string, {core: string[], sat: string[], etf: string}> = " + JSON.stringify(mapping, null, 2) + ";";
update_constants.cjs:const newEtfLinksStr = "export const ETF_LINKS: Record<string, string> = " + JSON.stringify(etfLinks, null, 2) + ";";

update_constants.cjs:  .replace(/export const MOCK_FUNDS: Fund\[\] = \[[\s\S]*?\];/, newFundsStr)
update_constants.cjs:  .replace(/export const FUND_MAPPING: Record<string, \{core: string\[\], sat: string\[\], etf: string\}> = \{[\s\S]*?\};/, newMappingStr)
update_constants.cjs:  .replace(/export const ETF_LINKS: Record<string, string> = \{[\s\S]*?\};/, newEtfLinksStr);

.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:declare global {

.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:declare const inlineConfig = {
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:  "nuxt": {}
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:}
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:type ResolvedAppConfig = Defu<typeof inlineConfig, []>
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:type IsAny<T> = 0 extends 1 & T ? true : false
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:type MergedAppConfig<Resolved extends Record<string, unknown>, Custom extends Record<string, unknown>> = {
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:  [K in keyof (Resolved & Custom)]: K extends keyof Custom
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:    ? unknown extends Custom[K]
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:      ? Resolved[K]
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:      : IsAny<Custom[K]> extends true
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:        ? Resolved[K]
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:        : Custom[K] extends Record<string, any>
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:            ? Resolved[K] extends Record<string, any>
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:              ? MergedAppConfig<Resolved[K], Custom[K]>
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:              : Exclude<Custom[K], undefined>
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:            : Exclude<Custom[K], undefined>
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:    : Resolved[K]
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:}
.nuxt/types/app.config.d.ts:

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      withoutBase(event.path.split("?")[0], useRuntimeConfig().app.baseURL)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    );
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  return event.context._nitro.routeRules;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function getRouteRulesForPath(path) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  return defu({}, ..._routeRulesMatcher.matchAll(path).reverse());
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function _captureError(error, type) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  console.error(`[${type}]`, error);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  useNitroApp().captureError(error, { tags: [type] });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function trapUnhandledNodeErrors() {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  process.on(
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    "unhandledRejection",
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    (error) => _captureError(error, "unhandledRejection")
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  );
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  process.on(
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    "uncaughtException",
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    (error) => _captureError(error, "uncaughtException")
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  );
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function joinHeaders(value) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  return Array.isArray(value) ? value.join(", ") : String(value);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function normalizeFetchResponse(response) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  if (!response.headers.has("set-cookie")) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    return response;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  return new Response(response.body, {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    status: response.status,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    statusText: response.statusText,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    headers: normalizeCookieHeaders(response.headers)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function normalizeCookieHeader(header = "") {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  return splitCookiesString(joinHeaders(header));
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function normalizeCookieHeaders(headers) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const outgoingHeaders = new Headers();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  for (const [name, header] of headers) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    if (name === "set-cookie") {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      for (const cookie of normalizeCookieHeader(header)) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        outgoingHeaders.append("set-cookie", cookie);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    } else {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      outgoingHeaders.set(name, joinHeaders(header));
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  return outgoingHeaders;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:/**
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:* Nitro internal functions extracted from https://github.com/nitrojs/nitro/blob/v2/src/runtime/internal/utils.ts
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:*/
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function isJsonRequest(event) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	// If the client specifically requests HTML, then avoid classifying as JSON.
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	if (hasReqHeader(event, "accept", "text/html")) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		return false;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	return hasReqHeader(event, "accept", "application/json") || hasReqHeader(event, "user-agent", "curl/") || hasReqHeader(event, "user-agent", "httpie/") || hasReqHeader(event, "sec-fetch-mode", "cors") || event.path.startsWith("/api/") || event.path.endsWith(".json");
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function hasReqHeader(event, name, includes) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const value = getRequestHeader(event, name);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	return value && typeof value === "string" && value.toLowerCase().includes(includes);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:const iframeStorageBridge = (nonce) => `
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:(function () {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const NONCE = ${JSON.stringify(nonce)};
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const memoryStore = Object.create(null);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const post = (type, payload) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    window.parent.postMessage({ type, nonce: NONCE, ...payload }, '*');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const isValid = (data) => data && data.nonce === NONCE;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const mockStorage = {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    getItem(key) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return Object.hasOwn(memoryStore, key)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        ? memoryStore[key]
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        : null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    },
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    setItem(key, value) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const v = String(value);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      memoryStore[key] = v;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      post('storage-set', { key, value: v });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    },
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    removeItem(key) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      delete memoryStore[key];
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      post('storage-remove', { key });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    },
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    clear() {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      for (const key of Object.keys(memoryStore))
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        delete memoryStore[key];
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      post('storage-clear', {});
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    },
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    key(index) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const keys = Object.keys(memoryStore);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return keys[index] ?? null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    },
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    get length() {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return Object.keys(memoryStore).length;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const defineLocalStorage = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    try {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      Object.defineProperty(window, 'localStorage', {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        value: mockStorage,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        writable: false,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        configurable: true
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    } catch {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      window.localStorage = mockStorage;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  defineLocalStorage();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  window.addEventListener('message', (event) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const data = event.data;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    if (!isValid(data) || data.type !== 'storage-sync-data') return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const incoming = data.data || {};
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    for (const key of Object.keys(incoming))
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      memoryStore[key] = incoming[key];
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    if (typeof window.initTheme === 'function')
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      window.initTheme();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    window.dispatchEvent(new Event('storage-ready'));
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  // Clipboard API is unavailable in data: URL iframe, so we use postMessage
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    window.copyErrorMessage = function(button) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      post('clipboard-copy', { text: button.dataset.errorText });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      button.classList.add('copied');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      setTimeout(function() { button.classList.remove('copied'); }, 2000);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  post('storage-sync-request', {});
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:})();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:`;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:const parentStorageBridge = (nonce) => `
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:(function () {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const host = document.querySelector('nuxt-error-overlay');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  if (!host) return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const NONCE = ${JSON.stringify(nonce)};
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const isValid = (data) => data && data.nonce === NONCE;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  // Handle clipboard copy from iframe
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  window.addEventListener('message', function(e) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    if (isValid(e) && e.data.type === 'clipboard-copy') {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      navigator.clipboard.writeText(e.data.text).catch(function() {});
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const collectLocalStorage = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const all = {};
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const k = localStorage.key(i);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (k != null) all[k] = localStorage.getItem(k);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    return all;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const attachWhenReady = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const root = host.shadowRoot;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    if (!root)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return false;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const iframe = root.getElementById('frame');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    if (!iframe || !iframe.contentWindow)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return false;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const handlers = {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      'storage-set': (d) => localStorage.setItem(d.key, d.value),
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      'storage-remove': (d) => localStorage.removeItem(d.key),
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      'storage-clear': () => localStorage.clear(),
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      'storage-sync-request': () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        iframe.contentWindow.postMessage({
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          type: 'storage-sync-data',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          data: collectLocalStorage(),
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          nonce: NONCE
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        }, '*');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    window.addEventListener('message', (event) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const data = event.data;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!isValid(data)) return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const fn = handlers[data.type];
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (fn) fn(data);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    return true;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  if (attachWhenReady())
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  const obs = new MutationObserver(() => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    if (attachWhenReady())
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      obs.disconnect();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  obs.observe(host, { childList: true, subtree: true });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:})();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:`;

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // Order matters: #frame + #preview adjacency

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    shadow.appendChild(toggle);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    shadow.appendChild(pipRestoreButton);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // Constants / keys
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const POS_KEYS = {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      position: 'nuxt-error-overlay:position',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      hiddenPretty: 'nuxt-error-overlay:error-pip:hidden',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      hiddenPreview: 'nuxt-error-overlay:app-preview:hidden'
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const CSS_VARS = {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      pip: {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        left: '--error-pip-left',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        top: '--error-pip-top',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        right: '--error-pip-right',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        bottom: '--error-pip-bottom'
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      },
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      preview: {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        left: '--app-preview-left',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        top: '--app-preview-top',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        right: '--app-preview-right',
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        bottom: '--app-preview-bottom'
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const MIN_GAP = 5;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const DRAG_THRESHOLD = 2;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // Local storage safe access + state
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    let storageReady = true;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    let isPrettyHidden = false;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    let isPreviewHidden = false;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const safeGet = (k) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      try {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return localStorage.getItem(k);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } catch {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const safeSet = (k, v) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!storageReady) 
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      try {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        localStorage.setItem(k, v);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } catch {}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // Sizing helpers
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const vvSize = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const v = window.visualViewport;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return v ? { w: v.width, h: v.height } : { w: window.innerWidth, h: window.innerHeight };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const previewSize = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const styles = getComputedStyle(host);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const w = parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--preview-width')) || 240;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const h = parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--preview-height')) || 180;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return { w, h };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const sizeForTarget = (target) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!target)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return previewSize();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (rect.width && rect.height)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return { w: rect.width, h: rect.height };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return previewSize();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // Dock model + offset/alignment calculations
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const dock = { edge: null, offset: null, align: null, gap: null };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const maxOffsetFor = (edge, size) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const vv = vvSize();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (edge === 'left' || edge === 'right')
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return Math.max(MIN_GAP, vv.h - size.h - MIN_GAP);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return Math.max(MIN_GAP, vv.w - size.w - MIN_GAP);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const clampOffset = (edge, value, size) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const max = maxOffsetFor(edge, size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return Math.min(Math.max(value, MIN_GAP), max);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const updateDockAlignment = (size) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!dock.edge || dock.offset == null)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const max = maxOffsetFor(dock.edge, size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (dock.offset <= max / 2) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.align = 'start';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.gap = dock.offset;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } else {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.align = 'end';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.gap = Math.max(0, max - dock.offset);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const appliedOffsetFor = (size) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!dock.edge || dock.offset == null)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const max = maxOffsetFor(dock.edge, size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (dock.align === 'end' && typeof dock.gap === 'number') {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return clampOffset(dock.edge, max - dock.gap, size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (dock.align === 'start' && typeof dock.gap === 'number') {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return clampOffset(dock.edge, dock.gap, size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return clampOffset(dock.edge, dock.offset, size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const nearestEdgeAt = (x, y) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const { w, h } = vvSize();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const d = { left: x, right: w - x, top: y, bottom: h - y };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return Object.keys(d).reduce((a, b) => (d[a] < d[b] ? a : b));
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const cornerDefaultDock = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const vv = vvSize();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const size = previewSize();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const offset = Math.max(MIN_GAP, vv.w - size.w - MIN_GAP);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return { edge: 'bottom', offset };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const currentTransformOrigin = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!dock.edge) return null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (dock.edge === 'left' || dock.edge === 'top')
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return 'top left';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (dock.edge === 'right')
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return 'top right';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      return 'bottom left';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // Persist / load dock
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const loadDock = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const raw = safeGet(POS_KEYS.position);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!raw)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      try {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        const { edge, offset, align, gap } = parsed || {};
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        if (!['left', 'right', 'top', 'bottom'].includes(edge))
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        if (typeof offset !== 'number')
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.edge = edge;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.offset = clampOffset(edge, offset, previewSize());
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.align = align === 'start' || align === 'end' ? align : null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.gap = typeof gap === 'number' ? gap : null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        if (!dock.align || dock.gap == null)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          updateDockAlignment(previewSize());
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } catch {}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const persistDock = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!dock.edge || dock.offset == null)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return; 
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      safeSet(POS_KEYS.position, JSON.stringify({
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        edge: dock.edge,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        offset: dock.offset,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        align: dock.align,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        gap: dock.gap
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }));
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // Apply dock
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const dockToVars = (vars) => ({
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      set: (side, v) => host.style.setProperty(vars[side], v),
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      clear: (side) => host.style.removeProperty(vars[side])
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const dockToEl = (node) => ({
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      set: (side, v) => { node.style[side] = v; },
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      clear: (side) => { node.style[side] = ''; }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const applyDock = (target, size, opts) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!dock.edge || dock.offset == null) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.clear('left');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.clear('top');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.clear('right');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.clear('bottom');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      target.set('left', 'auto');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      target.set('top', 'auto');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      target.set('right', 'auto');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      target.set('bottom', 'auto');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const applied = appliedOffsetFor(size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (dock.edge === 'left') {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.set('left', MIN_GAP + 'px');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.set('top', applied + 'px');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } else if (dock.edge === 'right') {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.set('right', MIN_GAP + 'px');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.set('top', applied + 'px');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } else if (dock.edge === 'top') {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.set('top', MIN_GAP + 'px');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.set('left', applied + 'px');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } else {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.set('bottom', MIN_GAP + 'px');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target.set('left', applied + 'px');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!opts || opts.persist !== false)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        persistDock();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const applyDockAll = (opts) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      applyDock(dockToVars(CSS_VARS.pip), previewSize(), opts);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      applyDock(dockToVars(CSS_VARS.preview), previewSize(), opts);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      applyDock(dockToEl(pipRestoreButton), sizeForTarget(pipRestoreButton), opts);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const repaintToDock = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!dock.edge || dock.offset == null)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const origin = currentTransformOrigin();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (origin)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        setVar('--error-pip-origin', origin);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      else 
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        unsetVar('--error-pip-origin');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      applyDockAll({ persist: false });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // Hidden state + UI
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    // =========================
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const loadHidden = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const rawPretty = safeGet(POS_KEYS.hiddenPretty);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (rawPretty != null)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        isPrettyHidden = rawPretty === '1' || rawPretty === 'true';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const rawPreview = safeGet(POS_KEYS.hiddenPreview);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (rawPreview != null)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        isPreviewHidden = rawPreview === '1' || rawPreview === 'true';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const setPrettyHidden = (v) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      isPrettyHidden = !!v;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      safeSet(POS_KEYS.hiddenPretty, isPrettyHidden ? '1' : '0');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      updateUI();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const setPreviewHidden = (v) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      isPreviewHidden = !!v;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      safeSet(POS_KEYS.hiddenPreview, isPreviewHidden ? '1' : '0');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      updateUI();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const isMinimized = () => iframe.hasAttribute('inert');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const setMinimized = (v) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (v) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        iframe.setAttribute('inert', '');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } else {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        iframe.removeAttribute('inert');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const setRestoreLabel = (kind) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (kind === 'pretty') {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        pipRestoreButton.innerHTML = '<span aria-hidden="true">⟲</span><span>Show error overlay</span>';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        pipRestoreButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Show error overlay');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      } else {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        pipRestoreButton.innerHTML = '<span aria-hidden="true">⟲</span><span>Show error page</span>';
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        pipRestoreButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Show error page');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const updateUI = () => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const minimized = isMinimized();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const showPiP = minimized && !isPrettyHidden;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const showPreview = !minimized && !isPreviewHidden;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const pipHiddenByUser = minimized && isPrettyHidden;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const previewHiddenByUser = !minimized && isPreviewHidden;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const showToggle = minimized ? showPiP : showPreview;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const showRestore = pipHiddenByUser || previewHiddenByUser;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      hide(iframe, pipHiddenByUser);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      hide(preview, !showPreview);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      hide(toggle, !showToggle);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      hide(pipCloseButton, !showToggle);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      hide(pipRestoreButton, !showRestore);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    let suppressToggleClick = false;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    let suppressRestoreClick = false;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const beginDrag = (e) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (drag) 
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.offset = def.offset;

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const isRestoreTarget = e.currentTarget === pipRestoreButton;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      drag = {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        kind: isRestoreTarget ? 'restore' : (isMinimized() ? 'pip' : 'preview'),
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        pointerId: e.pointerId,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        startX: e.clientX,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        startY: e.clientY,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        lastX: e.clientX,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        lastY: e.clientY,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        moved: false,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        target: e.currentTarget
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      drag.target.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (drag.kind === 'restore')
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        host.classList.add('dragging-restore');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      else 
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        host.classList.add(drag.kind === 'pip' ? 'dragging' : 'dragging-preview');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      e.preventDefault();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const moveDrag = (e) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!drag || drag.pointerId !== e.pointerId)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      drag.lastX = e.clientX;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      drag.lastY = e.clientY;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const dx = drag.lastX - drag.startX;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const dy = drag.lastY - drag.startY;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!drag.moved && (Math.abs(dx) > DRAG_THRESHOLD || Math.abs(dy) > DRAG_THRESHOLD)) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        drag.moved = true;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!drag.moved)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (rafId)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      rafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        rafId = null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        const edge = nearestEdgeAt(drag.lastX, drag.lastY);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        const size = sizeForTarget(drag.target);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        let offset;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        if (edge === 'left' || edge === 'right') {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          const top = drag.lastY - (size.h / 2);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          offset = clampOffset(edge, Math.round(top), size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        } else {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          const left = drag.lastX - (size.w / 2);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          offset = clampOffset(edge, Math.round(left), size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        }
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.edge = edge;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        dock.offset = offset;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        updateDockAlignment(size);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        const origin = currentTransformOrigin();
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        setVar('--error-pip-origin', origin || 'bottom right');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        applyDockAll({ persist: false });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    };
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const endDrag = (e) => {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (!drag || drag.pointerId !== e.pointerId)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const endedKind = drag.kind;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      drag.target.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (endedKind === 'restore')
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        host.classList.remove('dragging-restore');
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      else

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      const didMove = drag.moved;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      drag = null;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      if (didMove) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:        persistDock();

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:          suppressRestoreClick = true;

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:      }

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    const bindDragTarget = (node) => {

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:function generateErrorOverlayHTML(html, options) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const nonce = Array.from(crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(16)), (b) => b.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")).join("");
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const errorPage = html.replace("<head>", `<head><script>${iframeStorageBridge(nonce)}<\/script>`);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const base64HTML = Buffer.from(errorPage, "utf8").toString("base64");
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	return `
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    <script>${parentStorageBridge(nonce)}<\/script>
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    <nuxt-error-overlay></nuxt-error-overlay>
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:    <script>${webComponentScript(base64HTML, options?.startMinimized ?? false)}<\/script>
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:  `;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:}

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:const errorHandler$0 = (async function errorhandler(error, event, { defaultHandler }) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	if (event.handled || isJsonRequest(event)) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		// let Nitro handle JSON errors
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	// invoke default Nitro error handler (which will log appropriately if required)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const defaultRes = await defaultHandler(error, event, { json: true });
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	// let Nitro handle redirect if appropriate
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const status = error.status || error.statusCode || 500;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	if (status === 404 && defaultRes.status === 302) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		setResponseHeaders(event, defaultRes.headers);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		setResponseStatus(event, defaultRes.status, defaultRes.statusText);

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	if (typeof defaultRes.body !== "string" && Array.isArray(defaultRes.body.stack)) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		// normalize to string format expected by nuxt `error.vue`
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		defaultRes.body.stack = defaultRes.body.stack.join("\n");
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	}
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const errorObject = defaultRes.body;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	// remove proto/hostname/port from URL
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const url = new URL(errorObject.url);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	errorObject.url = withoutBase(url.pathname, useRuntimeConfig(event).app.baseURL) + url.search + url.hash;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	// add default server message (keep sanitized for unhandled errors)

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	// we will be rendering this error internally so we can pass along the error.data safely
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	errorObject.data ||= error.data;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	errorObject.statusText ||= error.statusText || error.statusMessage;

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const reqHeaders = getRequestHeaders(event);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	// Detect to avoid recursion in SSR rendering of errors
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const isRenderingError = event.path.startsWith("/__nuxt_error") || !!reqHeaders["x-nuxt-error"];
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	// HTML response (via SSR)
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	const res = isRenderingError ? null : await useNitroApp().localFetch(withQuery(joinURL(useRuntimeConfig(event).app.baseURL, "/__nuxt_error"), errorObject), {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		headers: {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:			...reqHeaders,
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:			"x-nuxt-error": "true"
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		},
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		redirect: "manual"
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	}).catch(() => null);
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	if (event.handled) {
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		return;
.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	}

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:	if (!res) {

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		{

.nuxt/dev/index.mjs:		return send(event, template(errorObject));

script.ts:
script.ts:const content = fs.readFileSync('utils/constants.ts', 'utf8');
script.ts:
script.ts:const mappingMatch = content.match(/export const FUND_MAPPING: Record<string, \{core: string\[\], sat: string\[\], etf: string\}> = (\{[\s\S]*?\});/);
script.ts:const mappingStr = mappingMatch[1];
script.ts:const mapping = eval('(' + mappingStr + ')');
script.ts:
script.ts:const mockFundsMatch = content.match(/export const MOCK_FUNDS: Fund\[\] = (\[[\s\S]*?\]);/);
script.ts:const mockFundsStr = mockFundsMatch[1];
script.ts:const mockFunds = eval('(' + mockFundsStr + ')');
script.ts:
script.ts:const fundMap = {};
script.ts:mockFunds.forEach(f => fundMap[f.code] = f);
script.ts:
script.ts:const toReplace = [];
script.ts:const allUsedFunds = new Set();
script.ts:
script.ts:for (const [persona, data] of Object.entries(mapping)) {
script.ts:  [...data.core, ...data.sat].forEach(code => {
script.ts:    allUsedFunds.add(code);
script.ts:    const fund = fundMap[code];
script.ts:    if (!fund) {
script.ts:        console.log('Missing fund:', code);
script.ts:        return;
script.ts:    }
script.ts:    const name = fund.name;
script.ts:    if (name.includes('貨幣市場') || name.includes('R/') || name.includes('RE/') || name.includes('TISA') || name.includes('R級別') || name.includes('R USD') || name.includes('R EUR') || name.includes('R GBP') || name.includes('R AUD')) {
script.ts:      toReplace.push({ persona, code, name, risk: fund.risk, type: data.core.includes(code) ? 'core' : 'sat' });
script.ts:    }
script.ts:  });
script.ts:}
script.ts:

script5.ts:    }

script5.ts:    console.error('Not enough available funds!');
script5.ts:    break;
script5.ts:  }

script5.ts:}
